name: Paradox Fusion
name_jp: パラドックス・フュージョン
desc: When a monster(s) would be Special Summoned, OR a Spell/Trap Card is activated: Banish 1 face-up Fusion Monster you control; negate the Special Summon or activation, and if you do, destroy that card, also during your 2nd End Phase, return the banished Fusion Monster to your field in face-up Attack Position.
eff: When a monster(s) would be Special Summoned, OR a Spell/Trap Card is activated: Banish 1 face-up Fusion Monster you control; negate the Special Summon or activation, and if you do, destroy that card, also during your 2nd End Phase, return the banished Fusion Monster to your field in face-up Attack Position.

action: Returns banished cards to the field
mst: Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
